steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student is comparing Switzerland's percent decline in hours worked to the other three countries in the table. The correct choice must accurately reflect the data: Germany −44%, Switzerland −22%, Brazil −16%, Japan −14%.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'though the percent decrease in hours worked in Switzerland was less than that in Germany, it was greater than that in Brazil and Japan': Switzerland (−22%) is less than Germany (−44%) and greater than both Brazil (−16%) and Japan (−14%). Accurate in every comparison. ✓
  • Choice B — 'the decline in number of hours worked was greater in Switzerland than it was in Germany, Brazil, or Japan': Reverses the relationship with Germany; Germany had a larger decline than Switzerland. ✗
  • Choice C — 'while the number of hours worked rose in Switzerland from 1950 to 2017, it declined in Germany, Brazil, and Japan': The table shows a decline in Switzerland, not an increase. ✗
  • Choice D — 'though the percent decrease in hours worked in Switzerland was greater than that in Germany and Japan, it was less than that in Brazil': Swaps Germany and Brazil; Germany's decline was larger than Switzerland's, not smaller. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
